name: String Concat
description: Concatenates two strings or joins a list of strings with an optional separator.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    sep = str(inputs.get('separator', ''))
    
    # Priority 1: Join a list if provided
    str_list = inputs.get('str_list')
    if str_list and isinstance(str_list, list):
        res = sep.join(str(x) if x is not None else '' for x in str_list)
    else:
        # Priority 2: Concat individual strings
        raw_s1 = inputs.get('str1')
        raw_s2 = inputs.get('str2')
        s1 = str(raw_s1) if raw_s1 is not None else ''
        s2 = str(raw_s2) if raw_s2 is not None else ''
        res = f'{s1}{sep}{s2}'
    
    self.log_info(f'Combined string: {res}')
    await self.set_output('combined', res)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'combined': res}
